full_text:
Ju Jun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ju Jun. Wounded then captured by Li Jue, he insulted Li Jue and was executed. Ju Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ju Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
